feat.name: Childlike Plant
feat.text: You’re adept at hiding your plantlike features to pass as a human. You become trained in Deception (or another skill if you’re already trained in Deception). You don’t require a disguise kit when attempting Deception checks to Impersonate a human. In addition, you gain a +4 circumstance bonus to Impersonate checks to pretend that you’re a human version of yourself, rather than a leshy. This bonus doesn’t apply to other checks to Impersonate humans.

traits.name: Leshy
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the leshy ancestry. These small plant or fungus creatures are humanoid in form. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by leshies. A weapon with this trait is created and used by leshies.
